'''âl-ng-zh''' ('''kalangazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polka|polka]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polka|polka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-ng-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kalangazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilangazh|thilangazh]] || [[word:jilangazh|jilangazh]] || [[word:shilangazh|shilangazh]] || [[word:kilangazh|kilangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulangazh|thuthulangazh]] || [[word:jujulangazh|jujulangazh]] || [[word:shushulangazh|shushulangazh]] || [[word:kukulangazh|kukulangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulangazh|thulangazh]] || [[word:julangazh|julangazh]] || [[word:shulangazh|shulangazh]] || [[word:kulangazh|kulangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulangazh|thulangazh]] || [[word:julangazh|julangazh]] || [[word:shulangazh|shulangazh]] || [[word:kulangazh|kulangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelangazh|thelangazh]] || [[word:jelangazh|jelangazh]] || [[word:shelangazh|shelangazh]] || [[word:kelangazh|kelangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholangazh|thotholangazh]] || [[word:jojolangazh|jojolangazh]] || [[word:shosholangazh|shosholangazh]] || [[word:kokolangazh|kokolangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholangazh|tholangazh]] || [[word:jolangazh|jolangazh]] || [[word:sholangazh|sholangazh]] || [[word:kolangazh|kolangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholangazh|tholangazh]] || [[word:jolangazh|jolangazh]] || [[word:sholangazh|sholangazh]] || [[word:kolangazh|kolangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlangazh|thĂŠlangazh]] || [[word:jĂŠlangazh|jĂŠlangazh]] || [[word:shĂŠlangazh|shĂŠlangazh]] || [[word:kĂŠlangazh|kĂŠlangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalangazh|thathalangazh]] || [[word:jajalangazh|jajalangazh]] || [[word:shashalangazh|shashalangazh]] || [[word:kakalangazh|kakalangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalangazh|thalangazh]] || [[word:jalangazh|jalangazh]] || [[word:shalangazh|shalangazh]] || [[word:kalangazh|kalangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalangazh|thalangazh]] || [[word:jalangazh|jalangazh]] || [[word:shalangazh|shalangazh]] || [[word:kalangazh|kalangazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalangazh|shalangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalangazh|goshalangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalangazh|gokishalangazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalangazhnĂŒ|shalangazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalangazhnknĂŒ|goshalangazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangazhnĂŒ|gokishalangazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalangazhshĂ«|shalangazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkshĂ«|goshalangazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalangazhshĂ«|gokishalangazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangazhro|shalangazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkro|goshalangazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangazhro|gokishalangazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangazhmu|shalangazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkmu|goshalangazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangazhmu|gokishalangazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalangazhsher|shalangazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalangazhnksher|goshalangazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalangazhsher|gokishalangazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalangazhng|shalangazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkng|goshalangazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalangazhng|gokishalangazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalangazhya|shalangazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkya|goshalangazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalangazhya|gokishalangazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalangazhyam|shalangazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkyam|goshalangazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalangazhyam|gokishalangazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalangazhnĂŒshĂ«|shalangazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalangazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalangazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalangazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalangazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangazhnĂŒro|shalangazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangazhnknĂŒro|goshalangazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangazhnĂŒro|gokishalangazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangazhnĂŒmu|shalangazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangazhnknĂŒmu|goshalangazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangazhnĂŒmu|gokishalangazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalangazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shalangazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalangazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalangazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangazhshĂ«ro|shalangazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkshĂ«ro|goshalangazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangazhshĂ«ro|gokishalangazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangazhshĂ«mu|shalangazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkshĂ«mu|goshalangazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangazhshĂ«mu|gokishalangazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalangazhronĂŒ|shalangazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkronĂŒ|goshalangazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangazhronĂŒ|gokishalangazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalangazhroshĂ«|shalangazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkroshĂ«|goshalangazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalangazhroshĂ«|gokishalangazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangazhromu|shalangazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkromu|goshalangazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangazhromu|gokishalangazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalangazhmunĂŒ|shalangazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkmunĂŒ|goshalangazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangazhmunĂŒ|gokishalangazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalangazhmushĂ«|shalangazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkmushĂ«|goshalangazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalangazhmushĂ«|gokishalangazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangazhmuro|shalangazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangazhnkmuro|goshalangazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangazhmuro|gokishalangazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
